title: Xenial Creamy German Pecan Roast
description: A hearty and comforting German dish featuring roasted vegetables and pecans in a creamy sauce, perfect for a sick day. This vegan-friendly recipe is made with a yeasty bread base.

ingredients.name: vegan cream
ingredients.notes: such as soy or coconut cream

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Tear the bread into small pieces and toast until lightly browned.
In a large bowl, whisk together the vegan cream, nutritional yeast, and smoked paprika.
Add the toasted bread, chopped pecans, sliced mushrooms, chopped onions, and chopped carrots to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and roast in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
Stir the mixture and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with additional chopped pecans if desired.
